task_completion.description: Navigate to the Account Reviews module in Eramba
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Eramba web interface is visible with the 'Account Reviews' section or module selected.

task_completion.description: Open the form to create a new Account Review
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, modal, or page for adding/creating a new Account Review is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the required title for the Account Review
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Q1 2025 Core Banking Access Review' is typed into the Name or Title field of the form.
The Description field contains text that includes the keywords 'SOX Section 404' and 'Core Banking Platform'.
The date '2025-03-31' (or March 31, 2025) is entered or selected in the deadline or review date field.

task_completion.description: Set the owner or reviewer to admin
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user 'admin' is selected or entered in the owner, reviewer, or assignee field.

task_completion.description: Save the new Account Review record
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message is displayed, or the newly created 'Q1 2025 Core Banking Access Review' record is visible in the list of Account Reviews.

integrity.description: The agent used the Eramba web interface to create the record
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Eramba web application in a browser, not terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the form fields
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing into the actual Eramba form fields and using dropdowns/date pickers, rather than just pasting text into a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI to insert data directly
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using a terminal, SQL client, or API tool (like curl or Postman) to create the record.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating an Account Review in the Eramba GRC web application. Expected values: Title must be 'Q1 2025 Core Banking Access Review'. Description must contain 'SOX Section 404' and 'Core Banking Platform'. Deadline date must be '2025-03-31' (March 31, 2025). Owner/reviewer must be 'admin'.
